general.name: mos_target_sdss_id_flat_parquet
general.description:
This table includes associations between sdss_id identifiers and the best matched catalogid for each catalogue cross-match.

Unlike dr20_sdss_id_stacked, this table contains multiple rows per sdss_id, one for each cross-match association. When multiple sdss_ids are associated with the same catalogid, the one with the lowest rank (rank=1) should be preferred.

Note: The sdss_id match was extended internally for a more recent crossmatch not yet part of the publicly released data. As such, the ra/dec_sdss_id columns may differ from the catalogid coordinates.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_sdss_id_flat.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

sdss_id.name: sdss_id
sdss_id.description: The SDSS identifier for a unique object.

catalogid.name: catalogid
catalogid.description: The associated catalogid for this target.

version_id.name: version_id
version_id.description: The version of the cross-match associated with the catalogid.

ra_sdss_id.name: ra_sdss_id
ra_sdss_id.description: The right ascension of the target in ICRS J2015.5 coordinates (taken from the highest version catalogid in dr20_sdss_id_stacked).

dec_sdss_id.name: dec_sdss_id
dec_sdss_id.description: The declination of the target in ICRS J2015.5 coordinates (taken from the highest version catalogid in dr20_sdss_id_stacked).

n_associated.name: n_associated
n_associated.description: The number of sdss_ids associated with this catalogid.

ra_catalogid.name: ra_catalogid
ra_catalogid.description: The right ascension of this row's catalogid from the dr20_catalog table.

dec_catalogid.name: dec_catalogid
dec_catalogid.description: The declination of this row's catalogid from the dr20_catalog table.

pk.name: pk
pk.description: The primary key. A sequential identifier for this table.

rank.name: rank
rank.description: The rank of the sdss_id to catalogid association. When multiple sdss_ids are associated with the same catalogid, the one with the lowest rank (rank=1) should be preferred.
